title: Cuneiform Tablet #0966: Middle Assyrian Astronomical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Astronomical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records astronomical matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
